author: Olivier Rouiller
description: Open and Embed Google Drive shortcut files (.gdoc, .gsheet, etc.) in a Web View. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Olivier Rouiller
manifest.description: Open and embed Google Drive shortcut files (.gdoc, .gsheet, etc.) in notes and the editor tab.
manifest.name: GDocs

name: GDocs

releases.author: oilandrust
releases.description:
## Summary

- More robust reading of `.gdoc` / `.gsheet` shortcut files on Google Drive–synced vaults.
- Retries and adapter fallbacks for macOS File Provider and cloud-only files.
- Clearer error messages with Google Drive–specific troubleshooting guidance.

## Test plan

- [ ] Click a shortcut in a Google Drive vault (file explorer)
- [ ] Embed a shortcut with `![[file.gsheet]]`
- [ ] Verify improved error text when a cloud-only shortcut cannot be read

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oilandrust/obsidian-gdocs/compare/1.0.6...1.0.7

releases.author: oilandrust
releases.description:
## Summary

- Embed Google Drive shortcuts in markdown notes with `![[My Sheet.gsheet]]` syntax.
- Embeds render inline in reading mode and Live Preview (desktop).
- File tab opens and embeds share the same embedded browser implementation.

## Test plan

- [ ] Click a `.gdoc` / `.gsheet` in the file explorer
- [ ] Embed a shortcut in a note with `![[filename.gsheet]]`
- [ ] Verify reading mode and Live Preview on desktop
- [ ] Verify mobile shows copy/open link fallback for embeds

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oilandrust/obsidian-gdocs/compare/1.0.5...1.0.6

releases.author: oilandrust
releases.description:
Obsidian community review lint fixes: settings heading, unused import, redundant type assertion.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oilandrust/obsidian-gdocs/compare/1.0.4...1.0.5

releases.author: oilandrust
releases.description:
Obsidian community review fixes:
- Use activeDocument instead of document for popout window compatibility
- Parse settings from loadData with typed validation
- Settings tab uses Setting API (from 1.0.3)
- Remove detachLeavesOfType on unload (from 1.0.3)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oilandrust/obsidian-gdocs/compare/1.0.2...1.0.4

releases.author: oilandrust
releases.description:
Open Google Drive shortcuts in the editor tab. Normal click reuses the active tab; Cmd/Ctrl+click opens a new tab. Removes Web Viewer handoff.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/oilandrust/obsidian-gdocs/compare/1.0.1...1.0.2

releases.description:
